main.description: A claim of representation between an entity and a representative.

subject.description: The DID of the person, or the AT-URI of the asset (e.g., a Movie) being represented.

representative.description: The DID of the agent, manager, publicist, or firm providing the representation.

role.description: The specific capacity of the representation (e.g., 'Talent Manager', 'Sales Agent', 'Legal Counsel').
